author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas Summer

Summer is coming to space.    

Join us for Star Atlas Summer, a three-part Town Hall series with each one paired with a major release and kicked off by a week-long celebration of our community.

Expect announcements. Expect releases. Expect alpha. Expect fun. And expect... REDACTED. July 28 - August 27.
